name: "Temp/Humidity Sensor Pack"

specs:
  chip: "AHT21"
  voltage: "2.2V-5.5V"
  protocol: "I2C (addr 0x38)"

---

AHT21-based temperature and humidity sensor on a compact breakout. Factory-calibrated, ±0.3°C accuracy. Plug into the Pclika I2C bus and get live readings through a single MCP bridge command.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Chip**: AHT21
  - **Voltage**: 2.2V-5.5V
  - **Protocol**: I2C (addr 0x38)
  - **Pins**: VCC, GND, SDA, SCL
  - **Dimensions**: 16 x 11 x 3 mm
  - **Weight**: 1.2 g
